name: qfoldit-skills
description: Eight scientific-simulation skills for Claude Code: VQE, L-systems, MEOR, bio-mining, corrosion, plant growth, plastic pyrolysis, and microbial prospecting.
author: qFoldIT

quantum.description: Classical VQE simulator (numpy) for small Hamiltonians

meor.description: Kinetics of microbial enhanced oil recovery

mining.description: Bio-oxidation and biosorption kinetics for metal recovery

oilgas.description: CO2 pipeline corrosion rate and remaining-wall-life estimation

plant-growth.description: Biomass growth modeling (climate, CO2, water, NPK)
